nodes.label: SPL 2.0 Abstract Syntax Tree node definitions.  Extends SPL 1.0 AST with nodes f
String, integer, float, or bool literal.
f'text {@var} more text' — interpolated string literal.     The template preserv
{'key': value, ...} — native MAP literal (serialized as JSON object).
Single item in a SELECT clause.
Single condition in a WHERE clause (deterministic comparison).
WHERE clause with conditions joined by AND/OR.
Semantic condition evaluated by LLM, e.g., 'coherent', 'complete'.
AND/OR compound WHILE condition: cond1 AND cond2 [AND cond3 ...]
DO <statements> END or DO <statements> EXCEPTION ... END
STORAGE(backend, path) — storage backend specification.      Used as the default
@memory['key'] — read a value from a STORAGE-typed variable.      At execution t
@memory['key'] := expr — write a value to a STORAGE-typed variable.
SELECT ... FROM ... INTO @var (used inside workflows), optional CTE block
Top-level program node containing a list of statements.
